body_transformation: The rounded head now features smooth, petal-soft horns with a delicate lavender sheen, their tips glowing faintly with starlight silver. The long tail transforms into a flowing ribbon of translucent fabric with crystalline veins tracing its length, tapering into a soft, petal-like tip. Robust body texture shifts to a supple, ivory-white fabric with a subtle shimmer, while the orange accents fade into soft petal gold along the edges. Four legs retain their low stance but now bear delicate, rounded foot pads with a faint glow, replacing the original stubby structure.
signature_feature: Horns: petal-soft lavender with starlight silver tips and crystalline veins.
